steps.title: Find the noun modifier
steps.content: The phrase "one of many nonpresidents" needs a modifier explaining which nonpresidents are meant. The blank should attach to that noun phrase, not create a separate finite clause.

steps.title: Reject finite verbs
steps.content: A, C, and D are finite verb forms. In this position, they cannot directly modify "nonpresidents" and would make the sentence ungrammatical.

steps.title: Use the infinitive modifier
steps.content: To appear forms a modifier meaning nonpresidents who appeared on US currency. The answer is B.
